title: Counting Bits
description:
Given an integer `n`, return an array `ans` of length `n + 1` such that for
each `i` (`0 <= i <= n`), `ans[i]` is the number of `1` bits in the binary
representation of `i`.

solutions.summary: A number has the bit count of its half, plus its lowest bit.

steps.title: Allocate the dp array
steps.explanation: Make an array of `n + 1` zeros; `dp[0]` is already correct.

steps.title: Build each count from its half
steps.explanation: Dropping the last bit (`i >> 1`) gives a smaller, already-solved number; add back `i & 1` for the bit we removed.
